name: LlamaDeploy
description: Deploy your agentic worfklows to production

name: Google ADK Java
description: An open-source, code-first Java toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control.

name: Concordia
description: A library for generative social simulation

name: Multi-Agent Shogun
description: Samurai-inspired multi-agent system for Claude Code. Orchestrate parallel AI tasks via tmux with shogun → karo → ashigaru hierarchy.

name: MoAI ADK
description: SPEC-First Agentic Development Kit for Claude Code — 24 AI agents + 52 skills with TDD/DDD quality gates, 16-language projects, 4-language docs. Go CLI, zero deps.

name: Agency Orchestrator
description: Agency Orchestrator turns a single sentence into a multi-role AI collaboration plan. It provides more than 211 expert roles, zero-code YAML workflows, and integrations with multiple LLM providers.

name: SWE-AF
description: Autonomous software engineering fleet of AI agents for production-grade PRs on AgentField: plan, code, test, and ship.

name: OpenSail
description: OpenSail is the open-source alternative to Codex App, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and Cowork for agentic software work.

name: SwarmClaw
description: Open-source self-hosted AI agent runtime and multi-agent framework for autonomous agent swarms. Agent memory, MCP tools, schedules, delegation, and 23+ LLM providers (Claude, GPT, Gemini, OpenRouter, Ollama). A practical Claude Code and LangChain alternative.

name: Kimi CLI
description: Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.

name: Claude Code
description: Reference coding CLI: strong influence on MCP client UX, repo-scale editing, and sub-agent patterns.

name: Cursor Agent
description: Dominant proprietary AI IDE reference for coding-agent UX and multi-file edit workflows.

name: Devin
description: Reference autonomous software-engineering agent; useful as closed benchmark/product comparator, not OSS peer.

name: GitHub Copilot Agent
description: Reference for mainstream developer adoption and GitHub-native agent workflow coverage.

name: Windsurf Cascade
description: Reference AI IDE agent for UX comparison with Cursor/Cline/Continue style systems.

name: Replit Agent
description: Reference for cloud IDE + runtime + deployment loop rather than pure code assistant.

name: ChatGPT Agent / Operator
description: Reference consumer/general-purpose browser/computer-use agent; compare against browser-use/OpenManus/OWL.

name: Gemini Code Assist / Jules
description: Reference Google proprietary coding-agent layer; compare separately from OSS Gemini CLI/ADK.

name: JetBrains Junie
description: Reference for professional IDE-native coding agents outside VS Code ecosystem.

name: Manus
description: Closed general autonomous agent reference; OpenManus is tracked separately as OSS-inspired alternative.

name: Perplexity Comet
description: Reference for browser-native research/assistant agents; not comparable to OSS frameworks by repo metrics.

name: Amazon Q Developer
description: Reference for enterprise/cloud-provider coding and operations assistant layer.

name: Lovable
description: Reference app-builder agent; classify separately from reusable OSS frameworks.

name: Bolt.new
description: Reference browser-native app-generation/runtime agent; compare to OSS platform builders and coding agents separately.

name: v0
description: Reference UI/app generation agent; useful for UX/app-builder category, excluded from OSS ranking.

name: Coze
description: ByteDance no-code agent building platform. Create, deploy, and publish AI agents and bots across messaging platforms (Discord, Telegram, X, WhatsApp). Available globally at coze.com.

name: Doubao Agent
description: Doubao Agent is ByteDance's AI assistant and agent product for conversational work, web search, image generation, document analysis, and autonomous task execution.

name: ERNIE Agent
description: Baidu's agentic layer on top of ERNIE models. Supports tool calling, RAG, and multi-step task execution via Wenxin Yiyan platform and ERNIE Bot API.

name: Kimi
description: Moonshot AI's conversational AI and agent product (kimi.moonshot.cn). Long-context specialist (up to 1M tokens), with agentic capabilities: web search, file analysis, code execution, and autonomous multi-step tasks.

name: Tongyi Agent
description: Alibaba's agentic platform built on Qwen models. Combines Tongyi Qianwen chat assistant with Alibaba Cloud Model Studio for enterprise agent deployment: tool calling, RAG pipelines, and workflow automation.

name: OpenClaw
description: Local-first personal AI assistant that answers in channels, acts through tools, coordinates agents/nodes through a Gateway, and keeps user data/control local-first.
